{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321142537FA9A585E8D7CFADC6970"}"},"total":222},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7241924042826892036","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很精彩的一部悬疑探案类作品，一共有八集，每一集都有若干个小案件，故事情节曲折离奇，对这种探案类小说，最大的乐趣就是跟着情节、跟着作者的笔墨，自己也进行一场头脑风暴，分析案情和凶手到底是谁。当然我常常猜错，但真正的凶手浮出水面之时，我便忍不住拍案叫绝：原来是他啊！藏得这么深！作者岳勇是一个老作者，写过多本作品，文笔凝练老道，每个人物都塑造得很好，值得一读。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1686141959,"group_id":"6855113265534471176","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"风格各异，码字百亿，总有一个适合自己😊","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Zb+v320RdVwgNjVNfAKh8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/85244acde9a34dc1ae32a6c01d097582~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623329&x-signature=R1MBpZaLrli2uoPo0%2BHILkJdxBA%3D","user_id":"333845687441864","user_name":"吾之蜜糖花香"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"333845687441864","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1741701789,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6855113265534471176","book_info":{"abstract":"染血的利刃，灼热的子弹，永远无法逃离的死亡噩梦。罪案连环，杀机重重，隐藏在背后的真凶究竟是谁？罪恶的双手尚未洗净，监牢的大门已经缓缓开启……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/6de2eec34a9ce2d2c5b9fedf902d17f7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"岳勇","author_id":"","book_id":"6855113265534471176","book_name":"诡案罪（全八册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202018","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"70万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7514948569044896830","read_count":"11826","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1222175"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"88","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6de2eec34a9ce2d2c5b9fedf902d17f7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258337&x-signature=pnhdW0nCTRNoB8p1Cjasd6YsbNk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321142537FA9A585E8D7CFADC6970"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1949},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7257123425734427455","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级带感，每个故事短小精悍，不看完猜不到凶手系列。主角是一个刑警，在档案室工作，接触到了很多陈年卷宗，由此故事开篇。其中一个魔术杀人的故事，有点吓人。表演人体拼图时有个人真的被杀了，这个桥段其他故事里也见过，不同的是后续的发展很不一样。抽丝剥茧有逻辑，迅速破案不啰嗦，有点早期故事会的风格，就是单刀直入没啥废话，第一个故事死亡连载也不错，女人死亡场景的特写让人毛骨悚然。","text_exts":[{"e":141,"s":138,"text":"故事会","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B%E4%BC%9A&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774074337FADC6970%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227257123425734427455%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226855113265534471176%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B%E4%BC%9A%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689680844,"group_id":"6855113265534471176","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwS9Y9krPcVJLciAWYkuPPTPX6VVkRAbKHGNcUkTFkYJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2940525617098147","user_name":"惊天撼地的古勒比加"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2940525617098147","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6855113265534471176","book_info":{"abstract":"染血的利刃，灼热的子弹，永远无法逃离的死亡噩梦。罪案连环，杀机重重，隐藏在背后的真凶究竟是谁？罪恶的双手尚未洗净，监牢的大门已经缓缓开启……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/6de2eec34a9ce2d2c5b9fedf902d17f7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"岳勇","author_id":"","book_id":"6855113265534471176","book_name":"诡案罪（全八册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202018","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"70万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7514948569044896830","read_count":"11826","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1222175"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"88","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6de2eec34a9ce2d2c5b9fedf902d17f7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258337&x-signature=pnhdW0nCTRNoB8p1Cjasd6YsbNk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321142537FA9A585E8D7CFADC6970"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":36992},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7455714626193031961","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"《诡案罪》这部小说以一起离奇的命案为引子，讲述了一名年轻的刑警如何通过层层剥茧、抽丝剥茧，最终将真凶绳之以法的故事。这部小说的故事情节跌宕起伏、扣人心弦，人物形象栩栩如生、呼之欲出。作者以其丰富的想象力和精湛的笔触，将读者带入了一个充满悬疑和惊险的世界。
小说的情节设计非常巧妙。作者通过一系列看似无关的事件，逐步揭示出案件背后的真相。在这个过程中，读者会不断产生疑问和猜测，直到最后的真相大白。这种情节设计不仅让读者保持高度的兴趣，也让整个故事更加紧凑和精彩。
作者的人物塑造也非常成功。小说中的主人公是一位年轻的刑警，他聪明、勇敢、正直，有着强烈的使命感和责任感。在故事中，他不仅要面对复杂的案件和危险的罪犯，还要面对内心的挣扎和成长。作者通过对主人公的刻画，展现了一个普通人在面对挑战时的坚韧和勇气，让读者深感敬佩。
小说的语言风格也非常独特。作者的文笔流畅、用词准确，既有文学性又有现场感。在描绘案件和人物形象时，作者运用了大量的细节描写和心理描写，让读者仿佛身临其境。同时，作者还巧妙地运用了一些比喻和象征手法，增强了故事的感染力和艺术性。
《诡案罪》是一部非常优秀的悬疑推理小说。它以精彩的情节、生动的人物和独特的语言风格吸引了众多读者的喜爱。我相信，这部小说不仅能够给读者带来紧张刺激的阅读体验，还能够引发人们对正义和勇气的深刻思考。","text_exts":[{"e":493,"s":489,"text":"悬疑推理","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%82%AC%E7%96%91%E6%8E%A8%E7%90%86&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774074337FADC6970%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227455714626193031961%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226855113265534471176%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%82%AC%E7%96%91%E6%8E%A8%E7%90%86%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735925889,"group_id":"6855113265534471176","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱情 言情 恐怖 科幻小说记录者","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzdK+xWQ9gtl2drmLKULW7Y=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/38d82ceb4294496d951dc6339504d91a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622043&x-signature=JZPfMlu6WgbqlsKAOs1cs%2FKOmkw%3D","user_id":"105450283195","user_name":"今天困乏了嘛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105450283195","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1780242173,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6855113265534471176","book_info":{"abstract":"染血的利刃，灼热的子弹，永远无法逃离的死亡噩梦。罪案连环，杀机重重，隐藏在背后的真凶究竟是谁？罪恶的双手尚未洗净，监牢的大门已经缓缓开启……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/n
